name: James Mwangi
title: Owner
catchphrase: SalesZote transformed how I run my shop!
content: Before SalesZote, I was manually tracking stock in a notebook and losing money on stockouts. Now I can see everything in real time from my phone. The M-Pesa integration alone has saved me so much time at the counter.

name: Aisha Omondi
title: Manager
catchphrase: Finally, a POS system built for Kenyan businesses.
content: I tried several POS systems but they were too complicated or didn't support local payments. SalesZote is simple, works perfectly with M-Pesa, and the support team is always available when I need help.

name: Peter Kariuki
title: Director
catchphrase: Managing inventory has never been easier.
content: With multiple suppliers and hundreds of products, inventory was a nightmare. SalesZote lets me track everything, get low-stock alerts, and manage supplier orders all in one place. It's been a game changer for us.
